hooks.name: Remind to turn off debug mode before commit
hooks.description: Checks if debug mode is enabled when a bash command runs (like git commit) and warns before proceeding.

action.command: grep -q 'let screenshotMode = true' Fundra/ContentView.swift && echo '⚠️ Debug mode is still ON (screenshotMode = true). Turn it off before committing?' >&2 && exit 0 || exit 0
